title: How Long does the App promoting Process take?
excerpt: Hey, currently Promoting a Workspace app.  Its been loading for about 10 minutes with status “Promoting” with a loading circle right next to the version name.  Is this normal?  Do I wait longer?  or did something glitch …

posts.author: Aurelien (Aurelien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, currently Promoting a Workspace app. Its been loading for about 10 minutes with status “Promoting” with a loading circle right next to the version name. Is this normal? Do I wait longer? or did something glitch out.

Screenshot 2023-10-27 at 6.18.26 PM2190×322 27 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Aurelien,

Promoting versions of apps with workspace templates can take some time.

If this does not change, please contact us via our support form: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=13855862562962.

Cheers,
Matias
